# B2B Buying Committee Routes

B2B software is rarely sold to one mind.

| Stakeholder | Wants | Proof needed |
|---|---|---|
| End user | Less pain, easier workflow | Demo, templates, speed. |
| Manager | Productivity, control | ROI, reporting, team workflow. |
| Finance | Cost control | Pricing, payback, contract clarity. |
| IT/security | Risk reduction | Security docs, SSO, data handling. |
| Executive | Strategic outcome | Business case, category argument. |
| Procurement | Vendor safety | Terms, implementation, references. |

Create separate proof routes when the buying committee is complex.
